description_long: This is a square decorative pillow with a predominantly white fabric cover adorned with intricate geometric and tribal-inspired patterns in dark gray and black. The design features horizontal bands of repeating motifs, including diamond shapes and stylized figures, giving it a modern yet ethnic aesthetic. The pillow appears to be well-stuffed, maintaining a plump and inviting form. On the upper left corner of the front face, there is a prominent black patch with white Chinese characters and the word 'COTTON 100%' printed, indicating the material composition. The stitching along the edges is visible, suggesting a durable construction. The overall appearance is clean and suitable for contemporary or bohemian urban interiors.
description: A square white pillow with dark geometric patterns and a black patch labeled 'COTTON 100%' on the front. The pillow is plump, clean, and visually striking with ethnic-inspired motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full geometric pattern and the black 'COTTON 100%' patch with Chinese characters in the upper left corner.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the pillow's thickness and the symmetry of the pattern along the edge, with the patch partially visible.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front's geometric design, with the black patch now on the upper right corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the pillow's depth and the central alignment of the pattern, with the patch partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: black patch with white Chinese characters and 'COTTON 100%' on the upper left front
attribute_tag_or_label: black printed patch on the front upper left corner
